name: sci-research
description: Claude Code plugin with five independent pipelines — deep research (/sci-research), real-time news scan (/news-scan), single-country daily news intelligence (/daily-news-intelligence), multi-country branded briefing (/daily-briefing), and company reputation tracking (/reputation-track). Multi-agent orchestration with source credibility grading, per-URL date verification, editorial-desk filtering, branded docx generation, HTML email rendering, and automated quality gates.
